itinerary.title: Premium Aizawl Special Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl City • Luangmual Handicrafts • Mizoram State Museum • KV Paradise
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM AIZAWL SPECIAL TOUR — Aizawl City • Luangmual Handicrafts • Mizoram State Museum • KV Paradise. 04 Nights / 05 Days Captivating Aizawl Family Getaway.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the charm, culture, and scenic beauty of Aizawl, the capital of Mizoram, with this TRAGUIN curated family getaway. Designed for a blend of cultural exploration and relaxation, this Aizawl Special itinerary offers a serene escape into Northeast India's mountain lifestyle. Experience warm hospitality with TRAGUIN's handpicked stays, creating unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-003 | Premium Aizawl Special Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Mizoram package (MZ-003 / TRG-AIZ-SPC-2026): Aizawl City • Luangmual Handicrafts • Mizoram State Museum • KV Paradise with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: TRAGUIN curated Premium Aizawl Special Tour with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl. Private transfer to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy the evening exploring local markets and mountain views.
activities: Evening exploration of local markets and mountain views.

days.title: CULTURE & MUSEUMS
days.description: Visit the Mizoram State Museum and local handicraft centres at Luangmual to learn about traditional Mizo life and iconic attractions.
activities: Luangmual handicraft centres and traditional Mizo life.

days.title: KV PARADISE & SCENIC VIEWS
days.description: Visit KV Paradise, a beautiful memorial with a poignant history. Enjoy the stunning panoramic views of the Aizawl valley.
activities: Panoramic views of the Aizawl valley.

days.title: LOCAL EXPLORATION
days.description: Enjoy a day exploring the unique local cafes, serene parks, and vibrant streets, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Local cafes, parks, and vibrant streets.
Leisure exploration at your own pace.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your premium Aizawl experience.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 4 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Guided cultural visits to Mizoram State Museum, Luangmual handicrafts, and KV Paradise.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
